data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Appeal/retake scheduling', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is fully satisfied. While the linked use case mentions that a candidate can appeal and schedule a retake, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate the implementation or testing of this functionality. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to assert that this requirement is met.
gaps: No concrete evidence of the implementation or testing of appeal/retake scheduling functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for appeal/retake scheduling implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete evidence or tests that demonstrate the functionality of appeal and retake scheduling.
